title: selaginella oviformis
intro: Selaginella oviformis, also known as the ovate spikemoss, is a species of flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Selaginella oviformis include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and processed into teas, infusions, or capsules to harness its potential health benefits.
